title: CCL - UI
scenario: CCL settings with three noise block options should appear in Device Settings > Advanced with the specified description.
steps: Locate the CCL (Conversation Clarity Level) settings section.
Verify the description text reads: "Limit the amount of nearby conversation transmitted through your microphone. (Note: changes will take effect on the next call.)"

Confirm there are 3 radio button options: No Noise Block ("Optimized for voice isolation"), AI Noise Block ("Enhanced for hybrid work environments"), UC Noise Block ("Best for open office environments").
expected: CCL settings are present in Device Settings > Advanced with the correct description and 3 radio button options: No Noise Block ("Optimized for voice isolation"), AI Noise Block ("Enhanced for hybrid work environments"), UC Noise Block ("Best for open office environments").
